name: INTEGRA LIFESCIENCES HOLDINGS CORP
business: Integra LifeSciences is a global medical technology company that manufactures and sells medical devices in two segments: Codman Specialty Surgical (CSS) and Tissue Technologies (TT). CSS provides neurosurgery, neurocritical care, and ENT solutions including surgical instruments, while TT offers wound reconstruction and care products and private label regenerative technologies.

exposures.sentence: The CSS segment, which represents approximately 70% of our total revenue, consists of market-leading technologies and instrumentation used for a wide range of specialties, such as neurosurgery, neurocritical care, and otolaryngology, commonly referred to as ear, nose, and throat ( ENT ).

catalysts.event: PMA approval for SurgiMend for post-mastectomy breast reconstruction expected in 2026 after operationalization of Braintree facility
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate PMA approval following the operationalization of the Braintree facility, which is expected in 2026.

catalysts.event: PMA approval for DuraSorb for implant-based breast reconstruction hoped for in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Currently, we hope to secure PMA approval for DuraSorb in 2026.

catalysts.event: Operationalization of Braintree facility expected in 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates the Braintree facility to be operational in 2026.

catalysts.event: Inaugural enrollment of first patient in AERA Pediatric Registry
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we announced the inaugural enrollment of the first patient in the AERA Pediatric Registry, a prospective, multi-center observational registry evaluating the real-world use of the AERA Eustachian Tube Balloon Dilation System in children.

catalysts.event: Launch of Mayfield Ghost Base Unit Post in the U.S.
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025 the Mayfield Ghost Base Unit Post launched in the U.S., which is designed to help provide clear visualization of anatomical structure and to support surgical accuracy and patient positioning.

catalysts.event: Launch of Durepair Dural Regeneration Matrix for commercial sale in the U.S.
catalysts.sentence: In 2024, we acquired the product rights for Durepair Dural Regeneration Matrix... and subsequently launched the product for commercial sale in the U.S. in October 2025.
